reasoning: Temperatures typically decrease from October to November in Poitiers, France. Evaluating the average mean for October 26 (roughly 11.5°C) against a later autumn resolution date (e.g., late November, roughly 6.5°C), we expect a decline of about 5°C. Considering a typical daily standard deviation of 4°C, the variance of the difference is about 32 (SD ~ 5.6°C). The probability that the later date experiences a higher average temperature than October 26 is mainly driven by daily weather variability, calculated as P(Z > 5.0/5.6), resulting in roughly an 18% probability.
